---
title: "Stata Code to Conduct and Test DID Model"
description: "This is a well developed code in dofile format to conduct DID model, and exculute roubustness test including event study, placebo test, and porpensity socre matching"
author: "Yifei Yuan"
date: "2026-05-27"
categories: [research, paper]
image: "PPAP.JPG"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

[![](PPAP.JPG){width="90%"}](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/x6i8eg1puo0ou5rvitovk/AMmo0IrETWFMyTxj2L7dpcA?rlkey=mudufdom0w58s7s72bp65ze21&dl=0)

[Click to download](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/x6i8eg1puo0ou5rvitovk/AMmo0IrETWFMyTxj2L7dpcA?rlkey=mudufdom0w58s7s72bp65ze21&dl=0)
<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
